name: S-6 --max-age-days flags provenance entries older than N days per the architecture freshness threshold
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, severity: P1, provenance: [{source: g, class: published-standard, section_id: "1.1", url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:abc}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rubric-provenance.sh" --tree tree --max-age-days 90 --now 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && echo stale 1>&2
